steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage highlights a clear temporal pattern: the rare form of lead is present in Shang dynasty artifacts but absent from all later Chinese bronze artifacts.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice B states the logical inference: if the lead source was used only through the Shang dynasty, later artifacts would lack it—which precisely matches the pattern.

The other three wrongly focus on irrelevant factors (A on value, D on analysis methods) or misread the facts (C falsely claims bronze was abandoned).

That matches choice B — B is correct.
